name: Carabao Group Public Company Limited
summary: Carabao Group Public Company Limited, through its subsidiaries, manufactures, markets, distributes, and sells beverages in Thailand and internationally. Its products primarily include carbonated and non-carbonated energy drinks, drinking water, ready-to-drink coffee, instant powder 3-in-1 coffee, vitamin C drinks, and zinc-contained drinks under the Carabao Dang, Carabao, Carabao Sport, and Woody C+ Lock brands. The company also manufactures, distributes, and procures glass bottles and aluminum cans, as well as carton boxes, oriented polypropylene labels, and shrink films used as packaging material for energy drinks and other beverages. In addition, it distributes third party products, including food and non-food category products; and manages distribution channels that includes multi-tiered agent system, distribution centers, cash vans, and modern trade channel, as well as engages in trading activities. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
